basics.name: Candidate Name
basics.headline: Data Analyst | Business Intelligence & Analytics
summary: Data professional with experience across analytics, reporting, and business-oriented data solutions.
Strong foundation in Python, SQL, statistical reasoning, dashboarding, and transforming raw data into structured insights.
Comfortable working across analytical workflows from data preparation and validation to reporting and stakeholder communication.

experience.title: Data Analyst
bullets: Delivered analytics dashboards and reports that improved visibility into business performance.
Built reusable data preparation workflows to reduce manual reporting effort.
Partnered with stakeholders to define metrics, validate data, and communicate actionable insights.

experience.title: Data Intern
bullets: Supported exploratory analysis and data quality checks for reporting projects.
Prepared clean datasets and documented assumptions for recurring analysis.

projects.name: Customer Analytics Dashboard
projects.description: Built a dashboard to monitor customer behavior, segment performance, and key business metrics.

projects.name: Data Cleaning Pipeline
projects.description: Developed a reusable workflow to profile CSV files, clean fields, and export analysis-ready datasets.

strengths: Structured problem solving -- clear approach to ambiguous analytical questions.
Stakeholder collaboration -- able to work smoothly with business and technical teams.
Ownership -- reliable execution from data preparation to final insight delivery.
